title: Dragon longsword
wikitext:
{{External|rs|rsc=Dragon sword}} {{Infobox Item |name = Dragon longsword |image = [[File:Dragon longsword.png]] |release = [[27 February]] [[2002]] |update = Latest RuneScape News (27 February 2002) |members = Yes |quest = No |tradeable = Yes |placeholder = Yes |equipable = Yes |stackable = No |noteable = Yes |options = Wield, Drop |examine = A very powerful sword. |value = 100000 |weight = 1.814 |exchange = Yes |id = 1305 }} [[File:Dragon longsword detail.png|left|130px]] The '''dragon longsword''' is the third-strongest [[longsword]] available in ''[[Old School RuneScape]]'', and can only be wielded by players who have at least 60 [[Attack]] and have completed the [[Lost City]] quest. As with all [[dragon weapons]], players cannot make this item using the [[Smithing]] skill. However, it can be purchased in the [[Zanaris#Market area|Zanaris marketplace]] from [[Jukat]] for 100,000 coins (requires a [[Diamond]] for entry). The weapon can also be received as a reward from elite [[Treasure Trails]]. It is a preferred weapon for players buying their first dragon weapon as it has a low cost but can still inflict significant damage. For a long time, prior to the 2005 introduction of the [[abyssal whip]] and [[dragon scimitar]], this was the weapon of choice for both [[player killing]] and training. It can be upgraded to the [[Dragon longsword (bh)]] with a [[Dragon longsword imbue scroll]], which has a +4 increased stab and +6 slash attack bonus, and a +25% accuracy bonus to the special attack. In addition, the special attack consumes only 15% special attack energy rather than 25%, and is one [[tick]] faster (2.4 seconds instead of 3.0 seconds). The upgraded version can only be used for [[PKing]] in the [[Bounty Hunter]] [[Minigames|minigame.]] ==Combat stats== {{Infobox Bonuses |astab = +58 |aslash = +69 |acrush = -2 |amagic = 0 |arange = 0 |dstab = 0 |dslash = +3 |dcrush = +2 |dmagic = 0 |drange = 0 |str = +71 |rstr = 0 |mdmg = 0 |prayer = 0 |slot = weapon |speed = 5 |attackrange = 1 |combatstyle = Slash Sword |image = [[File:Dragon longsword equipped male.png|130px]] |altimage = [[File:Dragon longsword equipped female.png|130px]] }} {{CombatStyles|Slash Sword|speed=5|attackrange=1}} ==Special attack== [[File:Cleave.gif|thumb|200px|A player performing the dragon longsword's special attack, ''Cleave''.]] The dragon longsword has a [[special attack]] called ''Cleave'', which raises the player's maximum hit by 25% for one hit, consuming 25% of the player's special attack energy. The accuracy roll for ''Cleave'' is based on the attack bonus of the player's currently selected style, which is rolled against an opponent's slash defence.{{CiteTwitter|author=Mod Ash|url=https://twitter.com/JagexAsh/status/1019216709914423296|date=17 July 2018|archiveurl=https://reldo.runescape.wiki/i/109277|archivedate=24 December 2022|quote=[Hey, do you happen to know whether the dragon long uses your current combat style for its spec or is just always slash? (...)] It uses your current style but rolls against the NPC's slash defence.}} ==Item sources== {{Drop sources|Dragon longsword}} ===Shop locations=== {{Store locations list|Dragon longsword}} ==Products== {{Uses material list|Dragon longsword}} == Used in recommended equipment == {{Used in recommended equipment}} ==Changes== {{Subject changes header}} {{Subject changes |date = 14 June 2004 |update = Special Attacks |change = The item was given a special attack, ''Cleave''. }} {{Subject changes footer}} ===Gallery (historical)=== {|style="text-align: center" cellpadding="15" |[[File:Dragon longsword detail (beta).png|center|300x150px]] |[[File:Dragon longsword detail.png|center|300x150px]] |- |[[File:Dragon longsword (beta).png|center]] |[[File:Dragon longsword.png|center]] |- |RuneScape 2
